languages.text: "Свидетельствую: согласно логам систем Сектора Бионика, генетор Эоганн Фебрус предпринимает попытки несанкционированного использования имплантационного трона вопреки его целевому предназначению. Рекомендуемые санкции: назначение техноепитимьи в сочетании с временным понижением ранга".

"Attesting: according to the logs of the Sector Bionica systems, Genetor Eogunn Februs is undertaking unauthorised use of the implantation throne contrary to its designated purpose. Recommended sanctions: imposition of a techno-penance combined with temporary rank reduction."
languages.original_text: "Свидетельствую: согласно логам систем Сектора Бионика, генетор Эоганн Фебрус предпринимает попытки несанкционированного использования имплантационного трона вопреки его целевому предназначению. Рекомендуемые санкции: назначение техноепитимьи в сочетании с временным понижением ранга".

traits.locale_text: "Attesting: according to the logs of the Sector Bionica systems, Genetor Eogunn Februs is undertaking unauthorised use of the central implantation throne contrary to its designated purpose. Recommended sanctions: imposition of a techno-penance combined with temporary rank reduction."

"Attesting: according to the logs of the Sector Bionica systems, Genetor Eogunn Februs is undertaking unauthorised use of the implantation throne contrary to its designated purpose. Recommended sanctions: imposition of a techno-penance combined with temporary rank reduction."

"Attesting: according to Sector Bionica system logs, unit Eo-gann Februs is attempting unauthorised use of the central unit contrary to its intended purpose. Recommended sanctions: imposition of a technical penalty combined with a temporary reduction in rank."

"Attesting: according to the logs of the Sector Bionica systems, Genetor Eogunn Februs is undertaking unauthorised use of the central implantation throne contrary to its designated purpose. Recommended sanctions: imposition of a techno-penance combined with temporary rank reduction."

"Attesting: according to the logs of the Sector Bionica systems, Genetor Eogunn Februs is undertaking unauthorised use of the implantation throne contrary to its designated purpose. Recommended sanctions: imposition of a techno-penance combined with temporary rank reduction."

languages.text: “确认：根据仿生区系统日志，基因士伊奥贡·费布鲁斯正于移植王座进行未授权操作，使其偏离既定用途。建议处置：施加技术苦修，并临时降级。”
languages.original_text: "Attesting: according to the logs of the Sector Bionica systems, Genetor Eogunn Februs is undertaking unauthorised use of the implantation throne contrary to its designated purpose. Recommended sanctions: imposition of a techno-penance combined with temporary rank reduction."

traits.locale_text: “确认：根据仿生区系统日志，基因士伊奥贡·费布鲁斯正于移植王座进行未授权操作，使其偏离既定用途。建议处置：施加技术苦修，并临时降级。”

languages.text: «Testificando: según los registros del Sector Bionica, el genetor Eogunn Februs está empleando el trono de implantación de forma no autorizada y contraria al uso debido del mismo. Sanciones recomendadas: imposición de tenopenitencia y reducción temporal de rango».
languages.original_text: "Attesting: according to the logs of the Sector Bionica systems, Genetor Eogunn Februs is undertaking unauthorised use of the implantation throne contrary to its designated purpose. Recommended sanctions: imposition of a techno-penance combined with temporary rank reduction."

traits.locale_text: «Testificando: según los registros del Sector Bionica, el genetor Eogunn Februs está empleando el trono de implantación de forma no autorizada y contraria al uso debido del mismo. Sanciones recomendadas: imposición de tenopenitencia y reducción temporal de rango».

languages.text: « Constat : selon les journaux des systèmes du secteur Bionica, le genetor Eogunn Februs exploite le fauteuil d'implantation de façon contraire à sa fonction, et ce, sans autorisation. Sanctions recommandées : l'imposition d'une technopénitence, associée à un déclassement temporaire. »
languages.original_text: "Attesting: according to the logs of the Sector Bionica systems, Genetor Eogunn Februs is undertaking unauthorised use of the implantation throne contrary to its designated purpose. Recommended sanctions: imposition of a techno-penance combined with temporary rank reduction."

traits.locale_text: Constat : selon les journaux des systèmes du secteur Bionica, le genetor Eogunn Februs exploite le fauteuil d'implantation de façon contraire à sa fonction, et ce, sans autorisation. Sanctions recommandées : l'imposition d'une technopénitence, associée à un déclassement temporaire. »

languages.text: "Doğrulama: Sektör Biyonika sistemlerinin günlüklerine göre Genetör Eogunn Februs, implantasyon tahtını belirlenen amacının dışında yetkisiz olarak kullanmakta. Önerilen yaptırımlar: Geçici rütbe tenzili ile birlikte tekno kefaret dayatılması."
languages.original_text: "Attesting: according to the logs of the Sector Bionica systems, Genetor Eogunn Februs is undertaking unauthorised use of the implantation throne contrary to its designated purpose. Recommended sanctions: imposition of a techno-penance combined with temporary rank reduction."

traits.locale_text: "Doğrulama: Sektör Biyonika sistemlerinin günlüklerine göre Genetör Eogunn Februs, implantasyon tahtını belirlenen amacının dışında yetkisiz olarak kullanmakta. Önerilen yaptırımlar: Geçici rütbe tenzili ile birlikte tekno kefaret dayatılması."

languages.text: "Bestätigung: Den Protokollen der Systeme in Sektor Bionica zufolge liegt eine nicht autorisierte Nutzung des Implantationsthrons von Genetor Eogunn Februs vor, die seinem ausgewiesenen Zweck widerspricht. Empfohlene Maßnahmen: Technische Sanktion einhergehend mit einer vorübergehenden Degradierung."
languages.original_text: "Attesting: according to the logs of the Sector Bionica systems, Genetor Eogunn Februs is undertaking unauthorised use of the implantation throne contrary to its designated purpose. Recommended sanctions: imposition of a techno-penance combined with temporary rank reduction."

traits.locale_text: Bestätigung: Den Protokollen der Systeme in Sektor Bionica zufolge liegt eine nicht autorisierte Nutzung des Implantationsthrons von Genetor Eogunn Februs vor, die seinem ausgewiesenen Zweck widerspricht. Empfohlene Maßnahmen: Technische Sanktion einhergehend mit einer vorübergehenden Degradierung.

languages.text: 「認証：セクター・ビオニカのシステムログによると、ユニット・エオガン・フェブルスが、意図した目的とは反して、中央ユニットの不正利用を試みています。推奨される制裁：技術的ペナルティの課与と、一時的な階級の減等」
languages.original_text: "Attesting: according to Sector Bionica system logs, unit Eogunn Februs is attempting unauthorised use of the central unit contrary to its intended purpose. Recommended sanctions: imposition of a technical penalty combined with a temporary reduction in rank."

traits.locale_text: 「認証：セクター・ビオニカのシステムログによると、ユニット・エオ・ガン・フェブルスが、意図した目的とは反して、中央ユニットの不正利用を試みています。推奨される制裁：技術的ペナルティの課与と、一時的な階級の減等」
